title: Comment from Trinity Health , HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: Trinity Health appreciates the opportunity to comment on policies set forth in RIN 0955-AA09. Our attached comments and recommendations reflect a strong interest in public policies that support better health, better care and lower costs to ensure affordable, high quality, and people-centered care for all.
